appliedUpdates.description: Routing assertions VAL-ROUTE-002/003/004/005 re-run with fresh webhook tests after orchestrator confirmed Editor access was granted and live probes succeeded (run_9ccbf1d4efff40119d1cc175856d1edb ats_only, run_6951335ffd5a4232ab5e4c0400fd18b9 browser_plus_ats). summary: Round 6 re-run for routing-enforcement milestone. All 4 previously-blocked assertions now PASS with fresh webhook runs. VAL-ROUTE-002 (ats_only): greenhouse+ashby executed, grounded_web excluded with explicit skip warning, writeResult appended=0 updated=13. VAL-ROUTE-003 (browser_plus_ats): all three sources executed with attribution, writeResult appended=1 updated=13. VAL-ROUTE-004: per-source counters/warnings confirmed explicit across all sources. VAL-ROUTE-005: positive-control validation confirmed routing truth-table works when both lane families are discoverable. Routing enforcement implementation is fully verified.
